PHYLAX.

The Immutable Guardian for AI Agents

01 Home02 Control Panel03 DocumentationArbitrum Sepolia Testnet
OWNER-CONTROLLED AI SESSION SECURITY

THE IMMUTABLE
GUARDIAN FOR
AI AGENTS.

Phylax is an ERC-4337 security layer for AI agents on Arbitrum Sepolia. Owners create bounded session signers for each agent, while on-chain guardrails and paymaster-backed gas coverage keep execution separate from the owner's main wallet authority and the agent's working capital.

THE PHYLAX INTERCEPTION FLOW

01. AI DEVELOPS DECISION

An external AI agent decides on an action such as swapping, lending, or rebalancing through its own off-chain logic.

02. TEMPORAL SIGNATURE

The agent signs the UserOperation with an owner-issued session signer secret. The owner EOA private key never leaves the dashboard setup flow.

03. ON-CHAIN GUARDRAIL

Phylax contracts enforce expiry windows, spend limits, and protocol whitelists directly on-chain before any external call is executed.

04. SAFE DISPATCH

Allowed actions settle through the bundler and Phylax paymaster flow, while blocked actions revert before the agent can drain funds.

INTEGRATED RGB PROTOCOL STACK

DEVELOPED TECHNOLOGY IMPLEMENTATION_

The current MVP stack combines delegated AI execution, on-chain policy enforcement, and ERC-4337 transaction sponsorship.

L2 Execution

Arbitrum Sepolia

Powers low-latency, secure rollups with minimum block times and gas efficiencies, perfect for high-speed automated agent triggers.

// INTEGRATED
Account Abstraction

ERC-4337

The execution model that lets delegated AI session signers submit UserOperations through smart accounts with policy enforcement.

// INTEGRATED
Delegated Authority

Session Signers

Owner-issued session signer secrets let AI systems execute within bounded scope without ever receiving the owner EOA key.

// INTEGRATED
On-Chain Security

Guardrail Solidity

Robust, self-contained interception module that guarantees absolute policy compliance right inside the transaction call stacks.

// INTEGRATED
Infrastructure

Pimlico Bundlers

Bundler infrastructure relays ERC-4337 UserOperations after Phylax assembles and signs them through delegated AI sessions.

// INTEGRATED
DEVELOPER & OPERATOR ROADMAP

SECURITY FAQS & INSTRUCTIONS

Product and integration notes for the current Phylax MVP direction.

quickstart-example.tsMVP Preview API
import { PhylaxClient } from "@phylax/sdk";
const secureClient = await PhylaxClient.fromEnv(config);
// Ready to submit guarded ERC-4337 actions

PHYLAX.

Smart-account guardrails for owner-bounded AI execution on-chain.
